title: Fly-Bye - Electric Fly Zapper (XL) 4000V, USB Rechargeable, LED Light – Fly Killer Electric Swatter for Home
bullet_points: ZAP WITH 4000 VOLTS OF POWER: Instantly eliminate pests like flies, mosquitoes, and wasps with a single satisfying zap! The large, powerful mesh ensures reliable results every time, keeping your home pest-free.

USB RECHARGEABLE & LONG-LASTING: With a built-in rechargeable battery, this electric fly swatter provides over 11,000 zaps on a single charge. Easily recharge via any USB outlet—whether it's your laptop, wall socket, or power bank.

BRIGHT LED LIGHT FOR NIGHT-TIME ZAPS: Equipped with a bright LED, this bug zapper ensures flies and insects have nowhere to hide, even in low-light conditions. Perfect for evening use, indoors or out!

SAFE AND SIMPLE OPERATION: Designed with family safety in mind, the swatter only activates when turned on and the button is held down. A protective layer covers both sides of the mesh to prevent accidental zaps.
DURABLE AND READY FOR ACTION: Made to last, this electric fly swatter comes with everything you need to keep pests at bay for years. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use (in dry conditions).
